title: RetailGPT: Personalized E-commerce Chatbot
short_description: Building a personalized e-commerce chatbot that combines customer, product, order, and policy data to answer user queries based on intent.

title: Google Play Store EDA & Tableau Dashboard
short_description: Exploratory data analysis of Play Store app performance and user review sentiment, supported by a Tableau dashboard.

title: Online Retail Customer Segmentation
short_description: Customer segmentation project using RFM analysis and unsupervised learning to identify business-relevant customer groups.
